title: Lemonade (LMND) Disrupts the Insurance Landscape and Posts Strong Q3 Results
text: Lemonade disrupts insurance landscape with strong Q3 results. Company grew in-force premium 24%, reaching $889 million. Revenue grew 19% to $136.6 million, beating expectations. Gross profit surged 71% year-over-year to $38 million. Gross profit margin increased to 27%. Gross loss ratio improved to 73%, strongest in four years. Customer count grew 17% to 2.3 million. Adjusted EBITDA loss: $49 million in Q3. Net loss: $68 million or $0.95 per share. Earnings per share of -$0.95 exceeded consensus projections by $0.07. Total headcount down about 7% to 1,216 despite business expansion. Management optimistic about sustaining positive net cash flow by end of 2024 and adjusted EBITDA profitability by 2026. Full Year 2024 expectations: in-force premium at year-end $940 million to $944 million, gross earned premium $823 million to $826 million, revenue $522 million to $524 million, adjusted EBITDA loss $155 million to $151 million.
